message: Starting P5.T4: NoMovesDetectionSystem Tests. Analyzed codebase patterns, all helpers and models confirmed.

P5.T4 done. Wrote Assets/Tests/EditMode/NoMovesDetectionSystemTests.cs with 14 NUnit tests: 5 null-guard constructor tests, 3 Playing-phase behavioral tests (publish on deadlock, suppress on stock, suppress on valid tableau), 4 phase-filter tests (Dealing/AutoCompleting/Won/NoMoves), and 1 Dispose unsubscription test.
